PR opened: https://github.com/MyThingsLab/mythings-core/pull/25

I've hit the session's cost budget before finishing verification. Here's the honest state of things:

**Done and committed** (commit `2121a3b` on `fleet-dispatch/my-uni-2`):
- Full MyUni v0: `src/myuni/plan.py` (deterministic pre-work → one Engine call → dedupe → cap → `create_issue`/`add_labels` behind `Policy.evaluate()` → ledger record) and `src/myuni/cli.py` (`myuni plan --issue N --repo owner/name --engine noop|claude-cli --max-topics`).
- `tests/test_plan.py`: happy path, noop degrade, all
